sections.one_line: Division of labor between LLM semantic judgments and Python lookups, mutations, and routing
Context-based judgment tasks handled by bounded cohort agents in Kernos
Deterministic backend tasks that do not require LLM understanding
Why separating plumbing from judgment keeps Kernos fast, deterministic, and adaptive
Architecture rules that keep the principal agent and cohorts isolated from each other’s reasoning
Related links for skill models, action loops, and cohort architecture.
